name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: The Manhattan Project
description: NES-original TMNT beat 'em up where the Turtles fight to rescue Manhattan.
aliases: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles 2: The Manhattan Project

backlog.reason: Strong NES-original TMNT beat 'em up and a good follow-up to the arcade adaptation.

access.notes: Included in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection.

acquisition.notes: Owned digitally through Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection.

notes: Original NES sequel, not based on a prior arcade release.
